programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ladies of the Evening
programme.desc: The house is fumigated and the girls move into a Miami Beach hotel. Previously, Blanche had won three tickets to see the opening of Burt Reynolds new movie and passes to the party held afterwards where they could meet him.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Take Him, He's Mine
programme.desc: Dorothy dumps a depressed Stan on Blanche so that she can go out with a naval officer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: It's a Miserable Life
programme.desc: The girls petition to save an old oak tree on the property of a hateful woman.

programme.desc: A generational clash occurs when Dorothy's son Michael and Rose's daughter Bridget visit.

programme.title: Movie: Girl in the Box
programme.desc: In 1977, a 22-year-old is picked up hitchhiking by a couple who abduct her. She is kept in a coffin-sized box hidden beneath the couple's bed. When out of the box, she is a live-in slave, babysitter and victim of the man's extreme fantasies.

programme.title: Movie: Girl in the Bunker
programme.desc: Based on the true story of Elizabeth Shoaf who was abducted and held captive in a hidden underground bunker. A man dressed as sheriff handcuffed her for possession of marijuana and marched her deep into the woods, to a bunker.

programme.title: Movie: I Am Elizabeth Smart
programme.desc: The story of Elizabeth Ann Smart, who as abducted from her home in 2002 and held captive for nine-months before being rescued.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lasting Impressions
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Foundation of Lies
programme.desc: The wife of a noted doctor goes missing and authorities believe it may have to do with an allegedly shady adoption ring until her husband goes house-shopping with another woman claiming to be his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing in Time
programme.desc: A young woman was reported missing after a fight with her husband. She was presumed to be dead and her husband was the prime suspect. Police were suspicious of a secondary suspect when he reported a suspicious fire in his car.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing Pearl
programme.desc: A woman doesn't return home, but a trail of blood is discovered leading to a basement.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Payback
programme.desc: In 1993 a 20 year old boy is found beaten to death and murdered in Florida. Soon, a bizarre story unfolds of sex, jealousy, and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: On a cold December night in 1993, Rose Larner stopped in a convenience store on her way to her boyfriend’s house. She was never seen or heard from again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Invisible Intruder
programme.desc: A Texas woman claims that an intruder attacked her and killed two of her sons, but detectives question her story when they find some inconsistencies at the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: A Chemist suddenly starts to suffer from foot pain, partial numbness, and hair loss. He was initially mis-diagnosed. Investigators started searching the lab he worked in and interrogated some co-workers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: Police exhume the body of a murdered woman to study bite wounds, which eventually lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Prosecutors turned to a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist to solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treading Not So Lightly
programme.desc: When a four-year-old girl is found unconscious in a parking lot, police concluded it was a hit and run vehicle accident, and left it at that. But the girl's mother was determined to find out exactly what had happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shopping Spree
programme.desc: A mother and her daughter leave home for a day of shopping, but never return. The little girl's body was found dumped off of a roadside, but there was no sign of her mother. Forensic science determined if the baby's mother was a suspect or a victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders
programme.desc: British detectives teamed up with a pioneering scientist to crack a case of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Whodunit
programme.desc: An evening out to a murder mystery theatre turns into a real life whodunit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Where the Blood Drops
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman convicted of her husband's murder, whose son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: A patient in a hospital emergency room says he cut his hand on a dumpster, but the doctor recognizes the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Horse Play
programme.desc: A young, happily married woman died tragically in a horseback riding accident. Her husband seemed far from grief-stricken and, when they investigated his background, police discovered a web of lies and a proficiency with pharmaceuticals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treads and Threads
programme.desc: For 15 months, a serial killer was strangling prostitutes in Florida, then taunting police by leaving the bodies in plain sight. The only clues were a tire impression and some threads. Forensics revealed that the killer was right under their noses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Payback
programme.desc: In 1993 a 20 year old boy is found beaten to death and murdered in Florida. Soon, a bizarre story unfolds of sex, jealousy, and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Formula
programme.desc: The mother of a suspiciously murdered four-month-old was convicted, but an explanation for the death would come five months later from the most unlikely of sources: his newborn brother.

programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Human Sawdust
programme.desc: A suitcase leads to the gruesome discovery of a nearly perfect crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Green Pen
programme.desc: When a Yale student mysteriously vanishes days before her wedding investigators comb a secure research lab for clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Car Accident
programme.desc: A healthy, young mother mysteriously dies after a minor traffic accident triggering an investigation to find out what caused of her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Family Tree
programme.desc: After the brutal slaying of a young couple on a road trip, the victims’ families begin receiving disturbing letters.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Church Lady
programme.desc: A gruesome discovery in a small town church sends investigators on a search for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Barn
programme.desc: When a popular handyman in a New Hampshire town is found murdered investigators follow forensic clues to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Killer Snapshot
programme.desc: An amazing new forensic tool turns a cold case around.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: In Too Deep
programme.desc: Dustin risks the remainder of his season on an ambitious move upstream to raging waters, in a quest to add to his record breaking gold haul. After a brush with death, Fred must come up with a new plan before someone gets killed in their 20-foot dive hole.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Viking Detective
programme.desc: Parker and crew face a potentially catastrophic flood at the Airstrip Cut. Tony uncovers a secret patch of gold-rich ground at Paradise Hill and logs his biggest gold weigh of the year. Rick throttles up his operation with a new water system.

programme.title: Gold Rush: No Questions Asked
programme.desc: Fred discovers a promising new section of ground under the old Mayor's house. Parker's co-foreman Mitch is confronted with a family crisis. Rick turns to the King of Klondike to keep his operation running.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Pay Dirt: Growing Pains
programme.desc: With added scenes and bonus content: Rick's team bands together after the loss of Carl, Fred's crew steps up after their loader dies and Tony pays the price for ignoring repairs.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The $6 Million Cut
programme.desc: Parker's record-setting pace rests in the hands of mechanic Shane Smith. Tony taps out the Megacut and pivots to open more ground. Fred calls on Mitch to help fine tune his operation. Dustin's crew returns to the deadly waters of The Chute.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Busted and Bushfixed
programme.desc: The most disastrous breakdowns and heroic bush fixes in Gold Rush history are revealed; with hundreds of thousands of dollars at stake, the miners battle broken machinery and make ingenious fixes to deliver millions of dollars in gold.

programme.title: Expedition X: Cambodia's Jungle Monster

programme.desc: Josh explores three locations where people connect with spirits and miracles, from a celebration honoring a mysterious American soldier on a remote Pacific island to portal to the dead in New Orleans.

programme.desc: Scott and his dad are fishing for Lake Okeechobee bass.

programme.desc: A destructive F4 tornado rips through a town. A propane plant fire prompts 12,000 people to evacuate. Police chase a semi-truck. A truck loaded with explosives crashes, and a GT racecar crashes through a barrier, flips, and bursts into flames.

programme.desc: Curtis is fishing Yellow Creek with friend Steve Renoksy and guide Bobby Kish.

programme.desc: Gary, Chase Parsons and crew search for early ice patterns of nomadic walleyes.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun: The Depth of Red
programme.desc: Justin shares why he never gets tired of chasing redfish.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Sahara
programme.desc: In the vastness of the Sahara desert and the terrifying beauty of towering sand dunes, Bear Grylls tackles extreme survival challenges as he shows you just what it takes to get out alive even when it means eating one of the world's deadliest scorpions.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Desert Survivor
programme.desc: In the hottest place on earth, Bear Grylls shows you how to get out alive as he tackles his biggest challenge yet - skinning and disembowelling a dead camel for water, food and shelter for a night under the stars.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Jungle
programme.desc: Bear Grylls tackles the jungle of Panama where he encounters some extreme eats, and shows you how to get out alive.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curses of the Nazis

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Strangest Soviet Ruins

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: In Poor Taste Buds
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr take to the court to serve up some seriously personal tennis lessons and then head to the park for a bewildering game of Now! The loser must put his face through the ultimate test during a food presentation.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dark Side of the Moon
programme.desc: The guys make passes at supermarket shoppers, then pose as reporters. Then, with a painfully invasive punishment, tonight's loser is the butt of the joke.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Uncool and the Gang
programme.desc: What was Sal's fear when Joe poured water in his mouth blindfolded? What punishmnet had producers so scared, they doubled security.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hump Day
programme.desc: Learn how the crew attracted more customers to eat at GRK, what piece of iconic 'Jokers' history was made in this same focus group space and who caused several delays in the filming of Q's zoo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out questions and trivia like why Q wore a wedding ring during a challenge, which crew member slapped him way too hard, and who has a history with the punishment guest.

programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbing grub infused with international flavours. There's a meaty spot in Wilmington, Delaware, putting Thai into sausage and Cuban into sandwiches.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Cross-Country Delivery
programme.desc: On the menu for Guy and his son today, there's a Wild West Virginia weenie, a new spin on a burger from Charlotte, N.C., a Miami Asian-barbecue mashup and a righteous baloney sandwich from Atlanta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Goes Hawaiian
programme.desc: Guy checks out the hot spots in Hawaii for food and visits an authentic luau.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Steaks and Chops
programme.desc: Guy looks at burgers and steaks in San Francisco and Cambridge.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Gone Global
programme.desc: Guy tries a Venezuelan sandwich loaded with shredded beef, black beans, and cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Global Grub
programme.desc: Guy is on the search for some awesome foreign flavours.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Bold Bites Brought Home
programme.desc: Since the Fieri Family loves both cooking at home and great restaurant food, they're combining the best of both worlds with some Triple-D style takeout.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Matters
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's stepping into some family kitchens. In Vancouver, B.C., the Chinese joint hand-pulling noodles and using ages-old family recipes for dishes like beef rolls.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Goin' the Extra Mile
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's headin' to some joints going all-in on some classic comfort foods. In Chicago, the burger joint with Asian flare proudly serves all things umami. In Memphis, a high-end chef takes low-down Southern staples to a whole new level.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fully Focused
programme.desc: Guy visits restaurants in Syracuse and Nags Head that have a definite direction.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Alaskan Adventure
programme.desc: Guy Fieri heads to Fairbanks for an Alaskan culinary adventure. There's authentic German specialties at a super funky food truck, a food-and-music jamfest featuring Cuban favorites and a local hot spot servin' up comfort with meatball subs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Spinning the Globe
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's checking out joints putting their own spin on global flavour. In Kauai, Hawaii, a culinary dojo ampin' up local specialties like saimin and chile pepper chicken. An outrageous twist on tacos and burritos in Kansas City, Mo.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Comfort Food With Attitude
programme.desc: Guy heads to California to a diner for a delicious meatloaf and a chilli parlour in Ohio.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Soups and Sandwiches
programme.desc: Guy is on the search the best comfort foods, such as a bacon blue cheeseburger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Atlantic to Pacific
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's getting a far-out taste of both coasts. In Bakersfield, Calif., a 75-year-old steakhouse fires up savoury stuffed pork chops and legit lobster mac 'n' cheese. Across town, a Latin-American fusion joint cranks out chicken and tri-tip.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Pork To Pasta
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diggin' into everything from pork to pasta on this trip. In Chicago, a real-deal Italian spot with righteous ravioli and dynamite deep dish.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Easy Comfort

programme.desc: Jeremy travels with experts to Noah's Ark's final resting place and finds incredible long-lost secrets of this famous vessel. Later, new evidence on the boiling seas in the Bermuda Triangle links an undersea volcano to many lost lives.

programme.title: River Monsters: Volcanic Island Terror

programme.title: River Monsters: Atomic Assassin

programme.title: River Monsters: Chainsaw Predator
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade heads to a remote river in the Australian outback to try and catch the rare but fearsome freshwater sawfish.

programme.title: River Monsters: Electric Executioner
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to Brazil's wild west in search of a river monster that has killed three cowboys. Jeremy finally corners his elusive prey in the most unexpected place. All he has to do then is catch it, without getting killed.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Welcome to Our World
programme.desc: A baby klipspringer is born on one of the coldest nights of the season and is miraculously nursed back to health. The California condor team at the Safari Park goes to unbelievable lengths to save this highly endangered species.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Yeti and the Cubs
programme.desc: There will be no peace in the world for the hamadryas baboons until Impo finds his mate. Luckily, the San Diego Zoo keepers have a plan. Two young cheetah cubs are training to become animal ambassadors with the help of their experienced canine guide.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: New Day for an Old Tortoise
programme.desc: Hunter the koala is ready for a mate. Jaws the Galápagos tortoise isn't feeling well and the zoo staff works to bring him out of his shell. The Safari Park has not one but two baby giraffe calves that need to be hand-reared simultaneously.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: A Lion's Tale
programme.desc: Safari Park keepers prepare Aria the rambunctious black rhino for her new life on the open African Plains exhibit. Zoo staff cares for 15-year-old legend M'bari the lion and his mate, Etosha. A vulture chick learns to eat from a surrogate puppet.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Panda-monium
programme.desc: The Zoo says goodbye to beloved pandas Bai-Yun and Xiao Liwu as mother and cub prepare to return to China. Tembo the retired 'Hollywood' elephant tries traditional Chinese medicine for her arthritis. The Butterfly Jungle gets colored for the season.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Mek Comes Home
programme.desc: After six years away, Mek the tiger returns to the Zoo. Two shy tree kangaroos, Spike and Polly, meet for the first time. And, with the Children's Zoo under construction, the keepers have to move over 100 animals, including a herd of reluctant goats.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Penguin Chick Swim School
programme.desc: Safari Park keepers say goodbye to two elephant brothers. We find out if the San Diego Zoo vets can design a custom shoe for Felix, an excitable three-toed baird's tapir. Then, two African Penguin chicks grow up and get ready to join the colony.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Marvelous Mott Mott
programme.desc: Max, a beloved camel, develops a large abscess on the top of his head. An adorable marmot prepares for her first classroom visit as an ambassador animal. Later, a peregrine falcon found at the base of skyscraper is bought to the zoo for a health check.

programme.title: The Zoo: Otter Under the Weather
programme.desc: Jasmine, a 14 year-old otter, is not her usual, energetic self. The staff of the New York Aquarium undertake a massive operation to move their sharks to a brand new exhibit. And the quirky capercaillies need help producing healthy chicks.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bouba's Back
programme.desc: Andean bear Bouba returns from the National Zoo in Washington D.C. to reunite with his loyal mate Nicole. Vets exercise the utmost caution in treating a venomous king cobra. Plus, Blanche, a feisty female alpaca, is due to give birth at any moment.

programme.title: Movie: Creed
programme.desc: When the son of his late friend decides to enter the world of boxing, Former Heavyweight Champion Rocky Balboa volunteers to serve as his trainer and mentor.

programme.title: Movie: Notorious

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Follow Your Nose
programme.desc: After winning $1 million on a quick pick Powerball ticket, a woman and her husband call on David Bromstad to help find their forever home. The house must come with a certain smell, however, challenging David to find one that passes her sniff test.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: 500,000 Reasons to Party
programme.desc: A Wisconsin mom is ready to ditch her tiny apartment after winning $500,000 on a scratch off. Now that her kids have left the nest, this house hunt is all about her and she asks David Bromstad to find a home with space to entertain friends and family.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: On the Throne
programme.desc: Billy won a million dollars on a scratch-off and changed his family's life, no longer living paycheck to paycheck. Now, they need help to find a forever home in Knoxville, TN, that fits their $180,000 budget.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Sparkle in the Sunshine State
programme.desc: After winning a million dollars, a couple seeks a home in Jupiter, FL, which is renowned for the lifestyle it offers to the rich and famous. Florida's booming population and low stock challenge David Bromstad to find a glamorous home at the right price.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: G'ma's Pad
programme.desc: With 37 piercings, 89 tattoos and endless wigs, David Bromstad has never met a winner like this grandma! She wants a big house so her elderly mother can move in with a yard to fill with grandkids, and David has a $200,000 budget to find her perfect home.

programme.title: Frozen in Time: Flashback: Livin' la Villa Loca

programme.title: Frozen in Time: Flashback: Never to Forever Home
programme.desc: Maureen McCormick and Dan Vickery dig into the archives to uncover some of their favorite HGTV transformations that give homes frozen in different decades some major TLC to turn them into present-day pads overflowing with charm.

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified: Tracking Bigfoot

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified: Zombie Apocalypse
programme.desc: The zombie apocalypse is one of the most depicted doomsday scenarios in popular culture. The COVID-19 pandemic hits as Paul Beban investigates, and he learns that something much worse than the walking dead may be on the horizon.

programme.title: Paranormal Declassified: Superhuman Soldiers
programme.desc: Paul Beban exposes a top-secret US military program to develop supersoldiers with psychic powers in the 1970s. He then uses government insiders to gain access to a modern-day initiative to mix man and machine, creating the superhuman army of the future.

programme.desc: Paul Beban investigates evil shapeshifters from Navajo folklore known as skinwalkers. Paul tracks the mythical beasts from the heart of Navajo Nation to the infamous Skinwalker Ranch in Utah to Wisconsin, where he captures something unexplainable.

programme.desc: Paul Beban investigates a reported surge of demonic activity in America that is overwhelming the Catholic Church. He follows leads from Gary, Indiana, to Mineral Wells, Texas, where he steps outside his comfort zone and into an alleged portal to hell.

programme.desc: Sworn enemies Altman and Flagg team up and hit the road in hopes of landing a major listing in La Jolla. Tracy gets creative to sell a Hollywood Hills artists enclave. James and David hit the hiking trails of LA to garner interest in a historic bungalow.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Razor's Edge
programme.desc: James and David struggle with an unrealistic seller in order to move their Hollywood bungalow. Tracy makes a personal decision to list her own Brentwood home, but wants a huge number for it. Flagg and Altman launch their co-list with a black tie affair.

programme.desc: Tracy tries to balance her new portfolio with her demanding developer who has high expectations and a rocky past with Altman. James and David are up against the clock to find their nine months pregnant client her dream home.

programme.desc: Altman struggles to convince an unrealistic seller but risks losing the potential listing. Tracy tries to attract interest for a new construction with mid-century bones in Pasadena. Flagg goes all out with a plane for his new resort-style trophy listing.

programme.desc: James and David host a backyard BBQ in Santa Monica, Altman goes after a new modern in Bird Streets, but is shocked when the sellers consider a low-ball offer. Flagg tries to find "Glee" star Becca Tobin her dream home in the historic Hollywood Hills.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: 24 Hours or Else
programme.desc: Altman races against the clock after being thrown a curveball by his Bird Streets sellers. James and David experience difficulties with their Santa Monica gem as the sellers have their own ideas about price, and who the buyers should be.

programme.desc: The case of a missing man uncovers a family willing to go to any lengths to get what they want.

programme.title: Snapped: Heather Horst
programme.desc: A young wife finds her husband dead, but police soon uncover a twisted web of lies and murder.

programme.title: Snapped: Judith Hawkey
programme.desc: Years after the tragic shooting of his father, a young man reveals the depths of his mother’s cruelty.

programme.title: Snapped: Gabriela Escutia
programme.desc: A murder in broad daylight causes the authorities to question whether it was an act of self-defense or a cold blooded murder.

programme.title: Movie: Miss Bala
programme.desc: Gloria becomes involved in the dangerous world of cross-border crime. In order to survive, she finds a power she never knew she had. Relying on all of the cunning and strength she can muster, she fights her way out.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Kids Are All Fight
programme.desc: When Homer gets an old film roll developed, the family takes a trip down memory lane to see the origins of how Bart and Lisa first started fighting with each other.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Let's Go Fly a Coot
programme.desc: The Simpsons learn about Grampa's days in the Air Force, and Bart takes up smoking to impress Milhouse's Dutch cousin, Annika.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bull-E
programme.desc: After Bart gets bullied at the school dance, Marge convinces the town to pass anti-bullying legislation. Homer then gets arrested and sent to rehab for bullying Ned Flanders, only to subsequently leave rehab as a hero.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mathlete's Feat
programme.desc: When a modernized Springfield Elementary has a technical meltdown, Lisa transforms it into a Waldorf school. Meanwhile, Groundskeeper Willie becomes the coach of the mathletes.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Every Man's Dream
programme.desc: Homer is diagnosed with narcolepsy, but instead of returning home with his prescription medication, he returns home drunk. He and Marge visit a marriage counsellor and have a trial separation, during which Homer begins dating a twenty-something.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Cue Detective
programme.desc: Scotty Boom, a Chew Network super-chef, challenges Homer to a smoke-off. But when someone steals Homer's secret weapon – a smoker he bought off a mysterious man at a BBQ shack – Lisa and Bart are on the case.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Puffless
programme.desc: Upon learning that their father really died of lung cancer, Selma and Patty agree to quit smoking. When Selma relapses, an angry Patty moves in with Marge and Homer.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Halloween of Horror
programme.desc: When Lisa becomes scared at the Krustyland Halloween Horror Night, Homer is forced to take down his Everscream Terrors decorations. Halloween pop-up employees seek vengeance on Homer for causing them to lose their jobs.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXVI
programme.desc: In the annual frightfest Halloween episode, Sideshow Bob finally kills Bart, only to reanimate him. Homer wakes up with short-term memory loss, and Lisa, Bart and Milhouse get super powers from radiation.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Friend With Benefit
programme.desc: Lisa befriends Harper, a new kid at school who happens to be super-rich. Homer befriends Harper's dad to enjoy the perks of Lisa having a rich friend. Lisa decides Harper is a bully and moves to end the friendship, but Homer tries to smooth things over.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa With An 'S"
programme.desc: When Homer loses $5,000 at a poker game with Broadway legend Laney Fontaine, the only way he is able to settle the bet is if he loans Lisa to Laney for a month.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Paths of Glory
programme.desc: Lisa sets out to restore the tarnished reputation of Springfield's first female inventor. To find her invention, she scours an abandoned asylum and a restaurant that caters to men.

programme.title: Family Guy: Family Guy Lite
programme.desc: After a mishap at work, Peter decides to take his health more seriously and diet with the help of Quagmire, Joe, and Cleveland. Meanwhile, takes a stab at writing a romantic fantasy novel.

programme.title: Family Guy: Throw It Away
programme.desc: After Lois reads a new book on the joys of decluttering, she challenges the rest of the Griffins to throw anything out of the house that does not spark joy. While all starts out well, Lois soon takes the decluttering to a surprising extreme.

programme.title: Archer: Reignition Sequence
programme.desc: An office romance is interrupted by the Russians.

programme.title: Archer: Achub y Morfilod
programme.desc: Archer and Lana travel to Wales for a romantic getaway of aiding separatists.

programme.title: Movie: Jumanji
programme.desc: A young boy and girl find a board game in their new home and begin to play it, only to realize that the actions in the game become reality. Once the game begins it cannot be stopped until they have played it all the way through.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two hip Miami undercover detectives have 72 hours to nab the crooks who stole millions in recovered heroin from the police station.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Boys II

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show

programme.title: Movie: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Spanish language movie.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Narcotics detectives Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett have been assigned to a high-tech task force that is investigating the flow of designer ecstasy into Miami. Their inquiries inadvertently lead them to a major conspiracy involving a vicious kingpin.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Namib Desert
programme.desc: Tune in and explore the Namib Desert. Discover its characters and the ingenious adaptations that allow them to cope with the harsh environment.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Elephant
programme.desc: The amazing life story of the most famous elephant to have ever lived: Jumbo. With scientists from around the world, Sir David has unique access to the elephant's skeleton at the American Museum of Natural History.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: North America
programme.desc: In winter, lynx prowl the Yukon for snowshoe hares and manatees seek hot springs to escape the freeze. In summer, Tennessee fish build spectacular underwater pyramids, fireflies light up the forest's nights, and polar bears leap from rocks as they hunt.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: South America
programme.desc: A look at the most species rich continent on Earth: South America. In the Andes, pumas hunt guanaco while rarely seen bears search for mini avocados. In the Amazon, poison dart frogs care for their babies and colourful macaws eat clay.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Asia
programme.desc: Visit the planet's largest continent. In the frozen north, walrus congregate in extraordinary numbers, bears gather inside volcanoes and yeti-like monkeys fight in the remote forests of China. In the tropical south, the last few Sumatran rhino roam.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Australia
programme.desc: A land cast adrift at the time of the dinosaurs. Here, kangaroos and wombats brave snowstorms and gum tree forests are filled with never-before-seen predators.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Europe
programme.desc: Europe is where wildlife survives alongside people. In Gibraltar, a baby monkey is kidnapped, while in the cemeteries of Vienna grave robbing wild hamsters fight. In this fairy tale continent wolves roam the forests and dragons lurk in caves.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Antarctica
programme.desc: Only the strong can survive in Antarctica, the world's most hostile continent. Elephant seals battle for territories, king penguins gather in colonies, and great whales feast on krill bait.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Africa
programme.desc: Even in Africa, home of the greatest wildlife gatherings on Earth, wildlife faces many challenges.

programme.title: Planet Earth: From Pole to Pole
programme.desc: The ultimate portrait of our planet looks at the key factors that shape our natural history. In the Arctic spring, a mother polar bear and cubs have two weeks to cross the frozen sea. Time-lapse cameras capture the transformation created by floods.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Mountains
programme.desc: A tour of the mountain ranges reveals how animals rise to the challenge of mountain life. The snow leopard finds habitat in the largest glaciers of the world.

programme.desc: When Charles hears of a new technological breakthrough, he decides it’s time to give his partially colorblind father the greatest gift of all: the gift of color.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Love Wool Find a Way
programme.desc: Dr. Pol performs health checks and gives vaccinations to puppies and foster kittens.

programme.desc: Take a look at what might really happen if we got a message from space. Scientists and sci-fi writers, with cooperation from SETI and Carl Sagan's son, Nick, unravel the impact of this world changing event.

programme.title: Alien Encounters: The Arrival
programme.desc: Take a look at how humans may react when an alien spacecraft makes its way to Earth.

programme.desc: When a bizarre, alien skeleton is found in an abandoned compound in the Himalayas, some speculate that it's the corpse of a newly-dead dinosaur, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of a top-secret Jurassic Park.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Skinwalker Awakens
programme.desc: Evidence of a man transforming into an animal is caught on camera on a Native American reservation in Utah, leading some experts ask if it's proof of a Skinwalker, a legendary evil creature that can shapeshift into a deadly beast.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: America's Paranormal Freeway
programme.desc: Eyewitness accounts report numerous UFO sightings along the 37th degree parallel cutting through the heart of the United States; an ex-deputy sheriff investigates if this strange pattern may be a paranormal freeway or something even more sinister.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Curse of Terror Island
programme.desc: In 1895, a lighthouse is built to warn ships of perilous rocks in the Flannan Isles. Historian Keith McCloskey investigates the theories after three lighthouse keepers disappear. A Russian police captain investigates the strangest case of his career.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: America's Haunted Highway
programme.desc: A pattern of eye-witness reports of UFOs along the 37th parallel, the 3000 mile long line that runs through the heart of the U.S sends ex-Deputy Sheriff Chuck Zukowksi to investigate.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Yeti: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New investigation of declassified Soviet files reveals evidence of an explanation for the grisly deaths of nine students who went missing in Siberia. Scientists examine clues that may prove the existence of a yeti.

programme.desc: In 1895, a lighthouse is built to warn ships of perilous rocks in the Flannan Isles. Historian Keith McCloskey investigates the theories after three lighthouse keepers disappear. A Russian police captain investigates the strangest case of his career.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Omens of the Mothman
programme.desc: Joaquin V Gonzalez is a small town in northern Argentina. Two strange events make this a UFO hot spot. In 2009 a strange creature is seen in West Virginia and more than 10,000 people suffer from a strange disease.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Ghost Yacht and Freaky Fires
programme.desc: Three friends disappear from their catamaran off the coast of Queensland. In a Sicilian village, ordinary items spontaneously combust.

programme.desc: Alien rain in Sri Lanka 2012. A fireball in the sky is followed by 60 days of days of red rain. Carolina Beach Boom- 2009 in North Carolina, Mike Hussey is disturbed by an earth-shattering sound.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Spontaneous Human Combustion and Mexican Pilot UFO
programme.desc: In Oklahoma, February 2013, a man is found completely incinerated to a pile of ashes in his own home. Pilot Carlos de los Santos was en route to Mexico City Airport when he was suddenly surrounded by three UFOs in the sky.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: America's Haunted Highway

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Forbidden Land of the Giants
programme.desc: In Borjami Valley, a team of experts uncover bones they believe belongs to a human that is over nine feet tall. Also, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Death From the Sky and Mexican Chupacabra
programme.desc: In Britain, a missing man's body is found with electrocution burns and a green ointment on him, his case is mysteriously closed down. Plus, hundreds of vampire-like attacks in Mexico leave livestock drained of blood.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Curse of the Lost Cosmonaut
programme.desc: When two experts build their own radio-listening station to intercept the secret communications of American and Soviet astronauts, they capture traces of a haunting voice that may be a lost Russian cosmonaut. New, declassified evidence reveals the truth.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: The Ghost on the Radio
programme.desc: When someone picks up a radio distress call from a seven-year-old boy lost alone in the desert, authorities embark on a search-and-rescue mission to find him; as the hunt continues, the case becomes more and more mysterious.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: To most people, teenage sweethearts Steven and Michelle Gibson seem to be happily married. They have four children and live a fun and adventurous life together. But the couple is harboring a dark secret, one that will tear the family apart.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Hell's Angel
programme.desc: When lonely teen Meagan Grunwald meets handsome 26-year-old felon Angel Garcia, it's love at first sight. But their whirlwind romance spirals into a hurricane of passion that leaves innocence destroyed and a trail of death and devastation in its path.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Naked Truth
programme.desc: A cold-blooded murder in a devout prayer group triggers a bizarre investigation in Oregon. As police uncover the unlikely culprits pulling the strings, chilling beliefs are brought to light.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Once an Animal
programme.desc: A cold case from Northern California heats up when Detective Molly Daul ties a brutal assault case she's working on to this twelve year old murder. And when this killer strikes in Portland, multiple homicide detectives team up to take him down.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: He's Coming for Me
programme.desc: With a serial killer on the loose in Arlington, TX, 22-year-old Adriane Fields can't shake the chilling suspicion that she's next on the list. Crippled by fear, she moves across town, only to come face-to-face with what she feared most.

programme.title: Diabolical: Control Freak
programme.desc: Donna Scrivo adult son Ramsay in days, and she's worried. She alerts the local police, but days pass with no sign of him anywhere. Then a grisly discovery of a severed human head and body parts along a rural highway reveals a act of shocking violence.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: discovery+ 1st Look: Hell in Hawaii
programme.desc: A handyman, living rent-free in the home of a generous friend, grows increasingly paranoid about his neighbors; filming them constantly and fighting with them incessantly until conflict escalates out of control and culminates in explosive violence.

programme.title: Fear Thy Roommate: Three's A Crowd
programme.desc: Two college girls rent an apartment off campus together, but they couldn't be more different. Little arguments escalate into an all-out war, and the presence of a boyfriend sends the feud over into a spiral of mutual hate ending in a deadly fight.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Killing Field
programme.desc: The parents of a young South Carolina couple are terrified when they go missing in 2016. Detectives find a clue that leads to strange storage container in the middle of 95 acres. What's inside unlocks secrets of a monster hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Betrayed: Blinded by Betrayal

programme.title: Deadly Women: Killer-In-Laws
programme.desc: These Deadly Women satisfied their blood lust within the family.

programme.desc: A Filipino woman falls for a married US Navy Officer who will do anything to keep his mistress and his money.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Second Chance at Death
programme.desc: While mourning the death of his wife, Julian falls hard for his much-younger coworker Teresa. For a time, her spunk lifts him out of to his sorrows until a sordid affair plunges him even deeper into the abyss.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Obsession Has Its Price
programme.desc: Bill Douglas is a respected doctor at Tufts University in Boston. But his focus isn't on science – it's on a bombshell prostitute he met in a red light district called the Combat Zone. Together, they lead double lives… leading to someone's murder.

programme.title: Dark Waters: Murder in the Deep: Screams of the South Pacific
programme.desc: Serena Karlan leaves everything she knows behind to join her boyfriend, retired NBA champion Bison Dele, aboard his catamaran in the South Pacific. Serena is the happiest she's ever been, until Dele's estranged brother surfaces and throws them off course.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Shot Above a Deli
programme.desc: What was planned as an easy robbery turns into The Carnegie Deli Murders. Sean Salley shoots an actress and her friends above a deli in New York, and flees to New Orleans and then to Miami where he plans to leave the country for good.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Family Coming After Me
programme.desc: After a fight in a mall, Eric Quesada murders his ex-best friend in a drive-by shooting. He goes on the run to Mexico, where he is caught by Mexican officials. Quesada spends two years fighting extradition before being sent back to the US.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Impersonate a Guard
programme.desc: Dennis Hope, a handsome and intelligent thief, pulls off a series of daring robberies and goes on the run while living a life of luxury. Commuting from Alabama to Memphis.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Pose as a Firefighter
programme.desc: Posing as a firefighter, a writer kidnaps a co-worker and terrorizes her for 16 hours before leading detectives on a chase.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got the Wrong Four People Killed
programme.desc: Scott Burnside hires a hit man to kill a friend's wife. But when the hit goes wrong, and four people are found murdered, Burnside flees to a remote island. On the run, Scott is unable to adjust to his lonely life. His family ties tip the Feds.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It
programme.desc: For these perpetrators, their stories may be different, but their motives are always the same: to stay out of prison and live life on the lam. They evade justice for years, using their families, fake ID's and sometimes violence to avoid capture.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Make a Dummy Out of Sheets
programme.desc: While facing five life sentences for a spree of Florida robberies, Frankie Lee Bass makes a daring escape and goes on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Build a Meth Lab
programme.desc: Jerry Wright built up a booming meth business in the hills of Tennessee until his lab blew up.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Revenge
programme.desc: Marshall Brown was 19 when he committed his first contract killing. A drug dealer put a hit out on Horace Morrison. Brown was soon convicted and spent the next 19 years in prison planning his escape. This is the story of his life on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Make a Dummy Out of Sheets
programme.desc: While facing five life sentences for a spree of Florida robberies, Frankie Lee Bass makes a daring escape and goes on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Build a Meth Lab
programme.desc: Jerry Wright built up a booming meth business in the hills of Tennessee until his lab blew up.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Pose as a Firefighter
programme.desc: Posing as a firefighter, a writer kidnaps a co-worker and terrorizes her for 16 hours before leading detectives on a chase.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Impersonate a Guard
programme.desc: Dennis Hope, a handsome and intelligent thief, pulls off a series of daring robberies and goes on the run while living a life of luxury. Commuting from Alabama to Memphis.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Bulge: Holding the Line
programme.desc: In December 1944, 83,000 Americans are assaulted by 200,000 Germans through thick snow and fog in the Ardennes forest. What follows is the biggest and bloodiest battle of World War II: the Battle of the Bulge.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Okinawa: Island Fortress
programme.desc: US troops come up against 120,000 Japanese soldiers on the island of Okinawa. Fighting through mountainous terrain and in treacherous conditions, American forces triumph and pave the way for the end of World War Two.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Courage at Sea
programme.desc: The biggest naval battle in history will be decided when a small group of under-armed, ill-prepared US ships find themselves in a chaotic and ferocious fight against the largest battleships ever built.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Headquarters
programme.desc: In this episode, Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil, to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Air Aces: Wing Walker
programme.desc: The crew of Lancaster ME669 had one of the most dangerous jobs in the Air Force.

programme.title: Air Aces: George Beurling
programme.desc: Canadian George Beurling broke every rule in the book yet became one of the greatest fighter pilots of World War II.

programme.title: Air Aces: Douglas Bader
programme.desc: In July 1940, Britain's most celebrated air ace, Douglas Bader, and his ragtag squadron of Canadian fighter pilots, went into battle against Hitler's mighty Luftwaffe.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: El Chapo: Cartel Killer
programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera AKA El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the U.S. marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family's Empty Nest
programme.desc: A family has the resources to give their Lincolnville, Maine, cabin the love it deserves now that their four children are almost done with college. However the cabin has been neglected for 25 years and corners were cut in the original build.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Rework in Wisconsin
programme.desc: A couple finds a fixer-upper in Wisconsin that overlooks Lake Michigan and they're doing all the renovation work themselves. He's a contractor with experience renovating properties, and she's ready to join him and get her hands dirty.

programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to cheer Hissy up by taking her to their favourite places. Later, A.R.F. is reprogrammed to take the pugs where they want, but not being them back.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Search and Rescue / Over the Dog Park Wall
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly are made honorary Coast Guard pups to keep every pet safe! Zeus' flying disc soars into the yard of a protective guard dog.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Super Duper Brother / The Smileyest Shark
programme.desc: Stanley the baby Shark has trouble making friends when his big pointy teeth scare everyone away! Pip and Freddy help JP one-up his older brother!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Sled Pup/ Baby Boogie
programme.desc: With Freddy unable to fly, baby Husky Hazel, pulls them sled-style to her delivery! Penelope, the baby platypus has a special way of dancing.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Mystery on the Muppet Express / Mister Manny
programme.desc: When Buddy the Bunny goes missing on the Muppet Babies Express, Summer Penguin sets out to find him. Mr. Manny steps in for Miss Nanny when she runs an errand.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Meatball Mayhem / Bunsen Honeydew, Show Stopper
programme.desc: Chef visits the playroom with some not-so tasty meatballs; When Beaker joins Muppet Rocksplosion, Bunsen sabotages their concert...with science!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Somewhere Under the Rainbow / Yoga Pups
programme.desc: The Pugs head to the end of a rainbow to find a pot big enough for Bob's St. Patrick's Day stew! Bob and the pups plan on joining the Playcare's yoga class!

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Overlooked/ Wish Upon a Star
programme.desc: Against Simon's wishes, Alvin borrows his latest invention, an invisibility suit, only to get the zipper stuck. When Theodore wishes on a shooting star, the Chipmunks try to learn what the wish is so they can make it come true.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Curiosity/ House Pest
programme.desc: Alvin gets a taste of his own medicine when he pulls one too many practical jokes on Simon.When Miss Croner finds termites have infested her home, she moves in with the chipmunks and drives everyone crazy.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Alvin Management/ Time Capsule
programme.desc: When Alvin accuses Dave of yelling at him too much, a therapist moves in to help Dave control his anger. When the school digs up an old high school time capsule, Miss Smith and Dave work together to keep an old secret.

programme.title: It's Pony: Useful/ Stompy!
programme.desc: Annie fears Dad will find Pony useless to the farm and get ride of him. Then, while fighting with Dog, Pony accidentally stomps on Annie's foot, just when she is all set to play soccer.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: You Doo/ Just Desserts
programme.desc: Timmy gets his hands on 'YouDoo' dolls; Timmy wishes for all food on Earth to be desserts.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Cheese and Crockers/ Land Before Timmy
programme.desc: Timmy wishes up a machine that will allow him to merge with other objects for Half Day.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Open Wide and Say Aaahg
programme.desc: Timmy's tonsils are coming out and nurse Vicky is determined to make his visit unpleasant.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Farm Pit/ Crock Talk
programme.desc: Dad decides to convert the Turner home into a farm. Unfortunately, it takes Cosmo and Wanda's magic to give Dad a green thumb and when they're swept away by a tornado, it's up to Timmy to save the farm and his fairies!

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: School Alone/ It Came From Outer Space
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany get stuck at school with a ghost that roams the halls; Alvin gets some unwanted attention when he claims to have found a meteor.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Back to Basics/ Report Cards
programme.desc: Everyone thinks Simon has lost his mind after he fails a school test and moves into a tree for some alone time. Alvin worries about his bad report card and does everything he can to intercept the mail before Dave sees it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Pink Purloiner/ Squid Wood
programme.desc: Rejected by Squidward, SpongeBob decides to make his own Squid ventriloquist dummy.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Best Day Ever/ The Gift of Gum
programme.desc: Spongebob is going to have the best day ever, until all of his friends have problems; It's Best Friends Day, so Spongebob and Patrick trade Best Friend presents.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton have been business rivals and bitter enemies for as long as anyone can remember, but Mr. Krabs explains that this wasn't always the case. Flashbacks reveal how their friendship went sour.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Original Fry Cook/ Night Light
programme.desc: SpongeBob is in awe of Mr. Krab's former chef; SpongeBob is scared of the boogeyman.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Rise and Shine/ Waiting/ Fungus Among Us
programme.desc: A look inside Patrick Star's rock, and his daily routine. SpongeBob finds out his favourite cereal has a mail in prize and goes to great length to get the toy, but earning the toy proves easier than waiting for it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spy Buddies/ Boat Smarts/ Good 'Ol What's-His-Name
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick spy on Plankton; SpongeBob makes an instructional boating video.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: New Digs/ Krabs a la Mode
programme.desc: SpongeBob moves into the Krusty Krab and turns it into an ice skating rink.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Roller Cowards/ Bucket Sweet Bucket
programme.desc: When the scariest roller coaster ever opens at Bikini Bottom's amusement park, SpongeBob and Patrick are determined to ride it. But the more they think about it, the less they want to do it. Later, Plankton tricks SpongeBob into fixing the Chum Bucket.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: To Love a Patty/ Breath of Fresh Squidward
programme.desc: SpongeBob makes the perfect Krabby Patty; Squidward begins to get on everyone's nerves.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob vs. the Patty Gadget/ Money Talks
programme.desc: SpongeBob competes against a patty-making machine; Mr. Krabs' money tells him to spend it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krusty Sponge/ Sing a Song of Patrick
programme.desc: Spongebob becomes popular at the Krusty Krab; Spongebob helps Patrick get radio play.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Flea In Her Dome/ Donut Of Shame/ The Krusty Plate
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to help Sandy rid her Tree Dome of fleas. Patrick accidentally takes a donut and is wracked with guilt. SpongeBob battles a persistent speck of food that is on a plate.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Goo Goo Gas/ Le Big Switch
programme.desc: Plankton creates a gas that turns everyone at the Krusty Krab into babies. After being enrolled in a cooks exchange program, SpongeBob switches places with a snooty French chef from a high-end restaurant.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Picture Day
programme.desc: SpongeBob must attend Picture Day for the Boating School Year Book.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Blackened Sponge/ Mermaidman vs. Spongebob
programme.desc: SpongeBob punches himself in the face, but tells everyone that he fought off a thug.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Inmates of Summer/ To Save a Squirrel
programme.desc: Instead of getting on the ship headed for summer camp, SpongeBob and Patrick accidentally board a ship full of prisoners on their way to jail on Inferno Island.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Pest of the West
programme.desc: SpongeBob discovers that he was related to the great Western hero, SpongeBuck.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: 20,000 Patties Under the Sea/ The Battle of Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs turn an old submarine into a mobile Krusty Krab. When Patrick and SpongeBob discover they have clashing views on cleanliness, their disagreement blows up into an epic battle.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Whatever Happened to SpongeBob
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to spend time with his friends but he ends up being a nuisance to everyone instead. They all tell him to go away, so with a heavy heart, he does just that.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Two Faces of Squidward
programme.desc: Squidward gets surgery done on his face after a door is slammed on him.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Rise of the Turtles
programme.desc: When Splinter allows his teenage sons, the Mutant Ninja Turtles, to visit the surface for the first time, they discover that the surface world isn't as simple as it first appears.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Turtle Temper
programme.desc: Raphael loses his temper when he is insulted by a New Yorker named Vic.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: New Friend, Old Enemy
programme.desc: Michelangelo tries to prove humans can be friends with Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: I Think His Name Is Baxter Stockman
programme.desc: The Turtles battle Baxter, a derange inventor on their way to see a movie.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Metalhead
programme.desc: Donatello creates a remote-controlled robot turtle to fight in his place.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers
programme.desc: The Power Rangers Beast Morphers were created to fight crime in the Morphin Grid.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Super Charge: Powers From the Past
programme.desc: A new team of Power Rangers must use their Dino Charges to save the world.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Simsky/ Lucky Day
programme.desc: Simon is alarmed to discover he's been tagging private property in his sleep. Alvin's luck goes from bad to worse after Theodore finds a four-leaf clover and everything starts going his way.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Pizza Dash/ Glory Days
programme.desc: The town is under attack when Simon creates a drone that can not only deliver pizzas but has the ability to learn.Alvin worries the munks are responsible for making Dave boring when they find out he used to be a rock star.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: A Rose by Any Other Name/ Queen Bee
programme.desc: Simon's experiment of how plants respond to positive or negative feedback creates a monster, and it is growing. Brittany's fear of bees turns into admiration when she's shrunk down to their size and experiences life as a bee.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Dog Days/ Dragon Dad
programme.desc: The Chipmunks take in a stray dog, but have to keep the puppy hidden from Dave, who won't allow pets. Theodore orders a dragon egg in the hopes of it hatching into a real dragon.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Members Only/ The New Kid
programme.desc: Alvin helps the mathletes stand up to the school bullies, but in the process they become bullies themselves. Alvin befriends a lonely new kid in school, but Theodore discovers the new student may not be who he says he is.

programme.title: It's Pony: Plants/ Heston's Coat
programme.desc: When Annie and Pony plan a camping trip, Pony becomes afraid of plants. Then, Heston loans Annie his new coat, but Annie knows Pony will ruin it.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Truth or Cosmoquences/ Beach Bummed
programme.desc: Cosmo wants help impressing people at his reunion; Timmy wishes he were stronger.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Girly Squirrely/ Birthday Battle
programme.desc: Catman thinks that Timmy has been kidnapped. Timmy wishes that his dad was mayor.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Crockin' the House/ Tardy Sauce
programme.desc: Mrs. Crocker leaves Mr. Crocker home alone for the first time, so he calls on Timmy to teach him how to have fun. Chloe wants to break the attendance record, but Timmy tells her school is canceled and drags her to a taco stand.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Add-a-Dad/ Squirrely Puffs
programme.desc: Dad is too busy to spend quality time with Timmy, so he wishes up 'a-lot-a-dads' to hang out with. It's a race between the Squirrely Scouts and the Cream Puffs to the top of Mount Doom.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Spring Break-Up/ Dimmsdale Daze
programme.desc: Timmy and Chloe wish their families could go camping together, which starts a feud between their parents. Chloe wishes that she could be a parent so that she can go to the Dimmsdale Daze carnival with Timmy.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Food Fight/ Please Don't Feed the Turners
programme.desc: Timmy wishes Mom were the best chef in the world.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Excaliferb!
programme.desc: During medieval times, Phineas and Ferb set off on an epic quest to find the legendary sword, Excaliferb.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon 3: Take Back the Falls
programme.desc: Ford discovers Bill's true motives and then a final confrontation with Bill leads to the Pines family's ultimate fate and greatest sacrifice.

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: Amphibia: Marcy at the Gates
programme.desc: The family must defeat an entire ant army before they enter Newtopia.

programme.title: Amphibia: Scavenger Hunt/ The Plantars Check In
programme.desc: Anne, Sprig and Marcy receive a mysterious message from the king of Newtopia that sends them on a puzzle-solving mission. Anne finally meets with King Andrias and tries to enlist his help in getting back home.

programme.title: DuckTales: Quack Pack!
programme.desc: The family is not quite themselves as they soon discover the planned family photo shoot might just be a part of a bigger 'wish' gone wrong!

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Kreioke Night / The Mascot Upshot
programme.desc: Krei enlists Big Hero 6 to help launch his latest invention, a karaoke machine he calls 'Kreioke.' Hiro plans to defeat The Mascots once and for all.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Night of the Living Pharmacists
programme.desc: Doofenshmirtz's latest '-inator' accidentally turns the citizens of Danville into contagious Doof-zombies who run rampant all over town. Agent P and the kids must work together to save Danville and avoid becoming Doof-zombies themselves.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb: Mission Marvel
programme.desc: Marvel's Avengers and Spider-Man join Phineas, Ferb and the gang in order to fight evil.

programme.title: Movie: Phineas and Ferb: Across the 2nd Dimension
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb team up with Agent P to travel to a parallel universe where they meet alternate versions of themselves.

programme.title: Baymax Dreams: Baymax Dreams of Glitch
Phineas and Ferb: Road Trip
programme.desc: Two stepbrothers build various objects with materials found around their home.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Where's Perry?
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb embark on an African safari vacation while their loyal pet platypus Perry stays back in Danville to handle a Dr. Doofenshmirtz emergency.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Where's Perry?
programme.desc: With Agent P nowhere in sight, Dr. Doofenshmirtz and Major Monogram square off against evil Carl who controls a set of Flynn-Fletcher robots to take over the OWCA, in one of the biggest battles yet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: One Good Scare Ought to Do It!
programme.desc: When Isabella is inflicted with an extreme case of hiccups, the boys attempt to scare them out of her by creating an ominous haunted house full of shocking surprises and thrilling twists and turns.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Sidetracked
programme.desc: Agent P teams up with a former partner, a human agent named Lyla, to stop a runaway train running along the United States and Canadian border. Agent P and Lyla must complete the mission, defeat Doofenshmirtz and save the train's passengers.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Out to Launch
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb build a rocket ship to get a better look and their mom and dad's star.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Chronicles of Meap
programme.desc: Space pod crashes carrying an unbearable cute alien, Meap; another adventure begins.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Meapless in Seattle
programme.desc: Meap returns to save Phineas and Ferb from his nemesis Mitch, whose real mission is to take control of all of alien-kind, putting Meap's world in danger.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's About Time!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb find an unfinished time machine in a museum and decide to fix it.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Primal Perry
programme.desc: When Perry comes face to face with an Australian platypus hunter who wants to destroy him, he must find a way to defeat this villainous foe.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Phineas and Ferb's Quantum Boogaloo
programme.desc: Future Candace follows Phineas and Ferb through time when the boys try to find a yet-to-be invented tool for their rollercoaster. However, Candace's actions unwittingly prevent Agent P from defeating of Dr. Doofenshmirtz, which alters the future.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bee Day/ Bee Story
programme.desc: Perry comes face to face with an Australian platypus hunter named Liam set out on destroying him. He must find a way to defeat this foe, rescue Doofenshmirtz from the error of his ways and save himself.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Operation Crumb Cake/ Mandace
programme.desc: Isabella sends a letter to Phineas admitting her true feelings, but instantly regrets her decision/ Doof invents an '-inator' to disguise himself as the local pizza delivery boy.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Love at First Byte/ One Good Turn
programme.desc: Mom asks for help and Candace and Stacy compete in Ultimate Obstacle Course.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Dude, We're Getting the Band Back Together!
programme.desc: The kids put on a concert in the backyard featuring their parents' favourite old band when Dad forgets his anniversary with Mom.

programme.title: Beyblade: Burst Surge: Locked On! Lightning Launch!
Beyblade: Burst Surge: Persistence! Kolossal Strike!
Phineas and Ferb: Der Kinderlumper/ Just Desserts
programme.desc: Candace is chosen to be Rutabega princess and gets to start the Running of the Chinchillas.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Forbidden Fountain of the Foreverglades!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Fly on the Wall/ My Sweet Ride
programme.desc: Buford removes a part from a tire swing the boys are building and it accidentally shoots a ray that turns Candace into a fly. Meanwhile, Doofenshmirtz is suffering from Evil Scientist’s block.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bully Bust/ Backyard Hodge Podge
programme.desc: Candace challenges Buford to keep the boys' invention from disappearing.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Knot My Problem/ Mind Share
programme.desc: Phineas and the gang switch bodies with alien tourists for a free intergalactic vacation, only to realize they were actually duped and are now stranded on the alien planet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Great Balls of Water/ Where's Pinky?
programme.desc: When Candace thinks Jeremy is bored with their usual hangouts, she sets out to find something unique to do with him. When Pinky goes missing, Phineas and Ferb create a machine that amplifies Buford's sense to those of a dog's.

programme.title: The Owl House: A Lying Witch and a Warden
programme.desc: When 14-year-old outcast Luz discovers a portal to a new world, she meets a witch, Eda, and a demon named King. In order to get home, Luz has to help them with a mission.

programme.title: The Owl House: Hooty's Moving Hassle
programme.desc: When Luz, Willow and Gus accidentally animate the Owl House, the house runs amok around Bonesborough.

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: The Owl House: Something Ventured, Someone Framed
programme.desc: When Gus sneaks Luz into Hexside School to present at the Human Appreciation Society, Luz sees a side of the school she didn't expect.

programme.title: The Owl House: Understanding Willow
programme.desc: Luz, Willow, and Amity take a trip down Memory Lane.

programme.title: The Owl House: The Intruder
programme.desc: Luz and King must defend The Owl House from a mysterious intruder.

programme.title: The Owl House: Really Small Problems
programme.desc: King confides in a carnival fortune teller who makes his dream come true, but it comes at a cost.

programme.title: The Owl House: Escape of the Palisman
programme.desc: When an adventure with Eda's staff goes awry, Luz and her friends have to earn the staff back from a mysterious forest creature, or lose the staff forever.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil

programme.title: Forensic Files: Beaten by a Hair

programme.title: Forensic Files: Invisible Intruder

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cats, Flies and Snapshots

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Yoga Store Slaying

programme.desc: This is the story of a woman convicted of her husband's murder, whose son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: A patient in a hospital emergency room says he cut his hand on a dumpster, but the doctor recognizes the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Speck of Evidence

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Doom of El Dorado

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Factory of Death

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ruins of the Rust Belt

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Fortress of the Spy
programme.desc: A battle-scarred ruin in the Middle East is evidence of espionage that resulted in tremendous violence on a vast scale; experts expose the truth behind the strange building that holds the secrets of one of the world's most infamous deceptions.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Conspiracy on Devil's Mountain

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds: Jet Crash, Train Collision

programme.desc: Isaac helped raise his siblings after his mom suffered a debilitating stroke when he was 10. While learning to cook for his family, he began comfort-eating. Now to avoid eating himself to death, Isaac must learn to take care of himself for a change.
